MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2014 Text Ruling

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2014 Continued To Apr-18-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA GOMEZ'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is continued to April 18, 2014 to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 19, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
